title: Set budgets for Genie usage ​
body:
**June 4, 2026**

On **July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC**, Genie products will move to a pay-as-you-go pricing model. Each user receives 150 DBUs of free LLM usage every month, equivalent to about $10.50 in the US East region. Usage beyond the free allowance is billed in DBUs. For more information, see the [release note](/aws/en/release-notes/product/2026/july#genie-products-now-use-pay-as-you-go-pricing).

To prepare, account admins can now create budgets to monitor and control spending on Genie usage. Scope a budget to Genie to track spend across your account, workspaces, user groups, or individual users, configure email alerts, and set per-user spending limits. See [Manage budgets and cost controls for Genie](/aws/en/genie/budgets).

ref_links.text: Manage budgets and cost controls for Genie
